snowflake.title: Data for Breakfast
snowflake.blurb: The opener shown at every Snowflake Data for Breakfast event to warm up the room before the show. Built the full asset suite for the series alongside it.

snowflake.title: Brand Manifesto
snowflake.blurb: Stock footage and Snowflake branded motion graphics cut together as a company brand film.

snowflake.title: Cortex Code Launch
snowflake.blurb: Launch video for Snowflake Cortex Code. Built on reusable MOGRT templates with ElevenLabs VO, part of a biweekly product release cadence in partnership with the product team.

snowflake.title: Summit 2026 Graphics
snowflake.blurb: A montage of motion graphics from Snowflake Summit 2026.

snowflake.title: Summit 2025 Graphics
snowflake.blurb: A montage of motion graphics from Snowflake Summit 2025.

snowflake.title: Cracking the Code
snowflake.blurb: A four part developer series, built as a templated MOGRT system so editors could handle the demo screens, titles, and transitions themselves.

snowflake.title: Snowflake Developer Channel
snowflake.blurb: Intros, outros, and lower thirds with a digital, Matrix style mosaic look, kept on brand.

snowflake.title: Recurring Series Packages
snowflake.blurb: Recurring event packages built to be repurposed by location and topic, including animated key art and a full LED background for Predictions.

snowflake.title: Modern Marketing Data Stack
snowflake.blurb: Full graphics package for the Modern Marketing Data Stack livestream — lower thirds, intros, outros, and transitions built as a reusable system.

snowflake.title: Snowflake × Anthropic
snowflake.blurb: LinkedIn social post announcing the Snowflake × Anthropic partnership.

snowflake.title: Snowflake × Burj Khalifa
snowflake.blurb: Snowflake × Burj Khalifa partner social film.

snowflake.title: Snowflake × Callaway
snowflake.blurb: LinkedIn social post for the Snowflake × Callaway partnership.

earlier.title: Sunset Drive
earlier.desc: Realtime Unreal Engine music video, Ki Militia
earlier.blurb: Built entirely in Unreal Engine, in realtime. Ki Militia's avatar was driven by the artist's own facial capture — no traditional filming needed. Start to finish in under three weeks.

earlier.title: No Love Lost
earlier.blurb: A cinematic web series shot in Bed-Stuy, in local businesses and with actors from the neighborhood.

earlier.title: IngrainedNYC
earlier.blurb: Editing on a set of Asian diaspora documentaries, made at the height of COVID and Stop Asian Hate.

earlier.title: Ki Militia, "Novacane"
earlier.blurb: A music video I shot and directed about a virtual date in VR that flips when the two people switch places. Lots of VFX and trippy shots. Same artist as Sunset Drive.

earlier.title: Clouse
earlier.blurb: A short made with friends for a 48 hour film festival in December 2025, about a person living inside another person, feeding them toxic alpha male advice.

earlier.title: Thank You
earlier.blurb: Wrote, shot, directed, and edited a short for NYU's official 48 hour festival in February 2020. It won Best Picture.
